message.content: I need to find significant milestones in the git history of this repository. Run `git log --oneline --since="2025-06-01" --until="2026-03-15" --reverse` to see commits from June 2025 through now. Also try `git log --oneline --all --since="2025-03-01" --until="2026-03-15" --reverse | head -200` if the first range doesn't capture enough. I'm looking for major milestones — things like: new major features landing, infrastructure migrations completing, directory restructures, spec completions, new tooling (like graft support), test infrastructure changes. Return the full log output so I can identify candidate timeline entries.

content.text: I'll run those git log commands to surface significant milestones.

content.text: Now let me get a wider view by looking at the most recent commits and working backward to identify clear milestones:

content.content:
dd90e081 jjb:1011-bd069728:₣AU:r: moved AUAAF to last
43d48dc8 jjb:1011-dd90e081:₣AU:r: moved AUAAF before AUAAV
fb886e31 jjb:1011-43d48dc8:₣AU:S: bind-vessel-support-and-plantuml-conversion
033ac433 jjb:1011-fb886e31:₣AU:T: bind-vessel-support-and-plantuml-conversion
ff7f9690 jjb:1011-033ac433:₢AUAAQ:n: Clarify vessel vs nameplate distinction in consumer docs: vessels are build definitions, nameplates tie sentry + bottle vessels into runnable bottles with moniker as tabtarget imprint
28196095 jjb:1011-ff7f9690:₢AUAAQ:W: Verified consumer README.md: all 29 referenced tabtargets exist, rbev-vessels/ survives prep-release, nsproto vessels confirmed. Fixed vessel vs nameplate distinction in both consumer docs (nameplate moniker is the tabtarget imprint, not vessel directory name). Updated vessel structure example with real fleet. Deleted purposeless rbev-nginx-ward bind vessel. Slated AUAAW for bind vessel support with plantuml conversion.
b43bcfdc vvb:1011-28196095::i: OFFICIUM 260313-1454
d68f6446 jjb:1011-b43bcfdc:₢AUAAL:n: Enhanced inspect with Build Output section (digest, media type, build ref, image name) and Build Cache Delta section (deduped new images) in shared display. Moved cache diff from full-only to shared. BCG-compliant variable declarations.
4ef24e48 jjb:1011-d68f6446:₢AUAAU:n: Remove beseech command (rbw-DB) superseded by rbw-Dc consecration check. Promote rbw-Dc from bare colophon to full rbtgo_consecration_check operation in RBS0 with new RBSCK spec. Delete beseech tabtarget, spec, zipper enrollment, and implementation.
593aa7ab jjb:1011-4ef24e48:₢AUAAL:W: Enhanced inspect with Build Output section (digest, media type, build ref, image name from buildkit_metadata.json) and Build Cache Delta section (deduped new images from cache_before/cache_after diff) in shared display for both compact and full modes. Moved cache diff from full-only to shared. BCG-compliant variable declarations.
fba39f8e jjb:1011-593aa7ab:₢AUAAU:W: Removed redundant beseech command (rbw-DB) — rbw-Dc (DirectorChecksConsecrations) supersedes it with platform awareness, tri-state health model, and regime-grounded vessel enumeration. Promoted rbw-Dc from bare rbtc_ colophon to full rbtgo_consecration_check operation in RBS0 with new RBSCK spec file. Deleted beseech tabtarget, spec (RBSAB), zipper enrollment, and 130-line implementation from Foundry.
c8d56084 jjb:1011-fba39f8e:₢AUAAF:n: Replace branching if/else jq digest extraction with uniform normalize-then-filter pipeline: first([.] | flatten | .[].Descriptor | select(.platform) | .digest). Handles both single-platform and multi-arch manifests without branching.
8a9d3f84 jjb:1011-c8d56084:₢AUAAV:n: Add dirty-working-tree guard to rbf_rubric_inscribe: fail early on unstaged or staged changes so inscribed scripts always match a committed state
3dda11ea jjb:1011-8a9d3f84:₢AUAAT:n: Spec updates for inspect and about enrichment: ark_inspect operation in RBS0 with colophons and linked terms, new RBSAI spec, about artifact contents table in RBSCB, inspect references in RBSCO/RBSGS, backlinks in RBSAC/RBSAS/RBSAV
f49b1f2b jjb:1011-3dda11ea:₢AUAAF:W: Replaced branching if/else jq digest extraction with uniform normalize-then-filter pipeline. Validated against 5 of 7 live GCB images (both single-platform and multi-arch); remaining 2 blocked by Docker Hub rate limit, not jq.
ae821417 jjb:1011-f49b1f2b:₢AUAAV:W: Added dirty-working-tree guard to rbf_rubric_inscribe. Both guards verified live: unstaged changes and staged changes each produce clear fail-fast error before any credential loading or network calls.
00a5abfa jjb:1011-ae821417:₢AUAAT:W: Spec updates for inspect and about enrichment: added ark_inspect operation with rbtgo_ark_inspect linked term and rbtc_inspect_full/rbtc_inspect_compact colophons in RBS0. Created RBSAI-ark_inspect.adoc spec. Documented all 6 about-artifact files in RBSCB. Added inspect references in RBSCO, RBSGS, and backlinks in RBSAC/RBSAS/RBSAV. Added RBSAI to CLAUDE.md acronym mappings.
71463109 jjb:1011-00a5abfa:₣AU:r: moved AUAAW to first
7f82593e jjb:1011-71463109:₣AU:T: prep-release-slash-command
6cbb6542 jjb:1011-7f82593e:₣AU:T: regime-variable-completeness-check

9d702e5d vvb:1011-50b3b186::i: OFFICIUM 260313-1643
b1ad3a1b jjb:1011-9d702e5d:₣AU:S: readme-architecture-diagram
93299bd9 jjb:1011-b1ad3a1b:₣AU:S: bcg-compliance-audit
ed613096 jjb:1011-93299bd9:₣AU:r: moved AUAAZ after AUAAW
6ba990b1 jjb:1011-ed613096:₣AU:S: mint-rbj-jailer-prefix
167744e4 jjb:1011-6ba990b1:₢AUAAW:n: Bind vessel support: converted plantuml vessel to bind mode, added rbf_mirror for upstream-to-GAR mirroring, refactored vouch into bind/conjure branches, fixed abjure for bind vessels, updated inspect display to branch on vessel mode, added DirectorMirrorsBind tabtarget and zipper entry
6e3f6a3e jjb:1011-167744e4:₢AUAAa:n: Rename sentry script prefix from rbss to rbj (Recipe Bottle Jailer) — resolves terminal exclusivity violation where rbs parented both spec documents and sentry code
bfc1b530 jjb:1011-6e3f6a3e:₢AUAAW:n: Unified ark creation: renamed DirectorConjuresArk to DirectorCreatesArk with rbf_create dispatcher that routes conjure/bind by vessel mode, removed separate DirectorMirrorsBind tabtarget, updated all RBZ_CONJURE_ARK references to RBZ_CREATE_ARK
f4ecc448 jjb:1011-bfc1b530:₢AUAAW:n: Fix rbf_create double-source (peek at vessel mode via grep instead of sourcing), add @ to fqin validator for digest-pinned image refs
ce6afe30 jjb:1011-f4ecc448:₢AUAAW:n: Update pluml nameplate bottle consecration to bind mirror result
9c308d31 jjb:1011-ce6afe30:₢AUAAa:W: Renamed sentry script prefix from rbss to rbj (Recipe Bottle Jailer): file rbss.sentry.sh → rbj_sentry.sh, RBSS_VERBOSE → RBJ_VERBOSE, RBSp → RBJp phase markers, updated rbob_bottle.sh references, added RBJ to CLAUDE.md. Resolves terminal exclusivity violation where rbs parented both spec documents and sentry code. rbw-Qf passed, nsproto-security 22/22 passed.
cd4d0d48 jjb:1011-9c308d31:₢AUAAW:W: Bind vessel support end-to-end: converted plantuml to bind mode, added rbf_mirror for upstream-to-GAR mirroring, refactored vouch into bind/conjure branches, fixed abjure for bind vessels, updated inspect display to branch on vessel mode, unified DirectorCreatesArk tabtarget that dispatches conjure vs mirror by vessel mode, fixed fqin validator for digest-pinned refs. Full pipeline verified: mirror → vouch → summon → inspect → bottle start all working for bind vessels.
401d3c8c jjb:1011-cd4d0d48:₣AU:n: Add collaboration style preferences and paddock-first mount protocol guidance — earned through conversation, not designed at a desk
929107ba jjb:1011-401d3c8c:₣AU:S: bind-mirror-syft-via-container
061a67c0 jjb:1011-929107ba:₢AUAAb:n: Replace local syft binary check with containerized syft via docker run using RBRG_SYFT_IMAGE_REF against mirrored GAR image, matching conjure Cloud Build pattern
6d44c551 jjb:1011-061a67c0:₢AUAAb:n: Update pluml nameplate to new consecration with SBOM
fb95fac7 jjb:1011-6d44c551:₢AUAAb:n: Add digest fidelity verification to bind vouch: compares GAR Docker-Content-Digest against RBRV_BIND_IMAGE pin digest, records both in vouch_summary.json with match verdict, updated inspect display to show digest comparison
899c7309 jjb:1011-fb95fac7:₢AUAAb:n: Update pluml nameplate for digest-verified mirror test
f9fd0ffd jjb:1011-899c7309:₢AUAAb:W: Containerized syft SBOM for bind mirror using RBRG_SYFT_IMAGE_REF via docker run (matching conjure Cloud Build pattern), plus load-bearing digest fidelity verification in bind vouch comparing GAR Docker-Content-Digest against RBRV_BIND_IMAGE pin. Updated inspect display to show pin/GAR digest comparison and match verdict. Full pipeline verified end-to-end with 305-package SBOM.

RBK: grep|head|sed pipelines replaced with while-read+case builtins for vessel mode extraction and HTTP digest extraction, git rev-parse/config to temp files in mirror and inscribe functions, date to temp files for build timestamps and vouch timestamps, grep in rbrr_cli replaced with while-read+case builtin

RBGP: OAuth token exchange extracted to zrbgp_authorization_exchange_capture (BCG-correct: return 1 not buc_die), OAuth JSON parsing to batch jq extraction, bug_prompt to temp file, date/base64/jq operational code to scratch-file patterns. Added ZRBF_SCRATCH_FILE and ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE kindle constants.
db573a69 jjb:1011-58a96620:₢AUAAZ:n: BCG command substitution rule broadening: decompose blanket prohibition into three specific prohibited patterns (local+capture, pipelines inside $(), unguarded $()) and three legitimate forms (single-command with || buc_die, _capture/_recite contracts, source-time constants). Finding from wave 4 compliance audit — original rule was over-constrictive, prohibiting safe patterns like $(date +%s) || buc_die while the real risks are hidden pipeline failures and local swallowing exit status.

content.text:
Excellent. Now I have a comprehensive view of the git history. Let me compile the significant milestones from the data I've gathered.

## Major Milestones in Recipe Bottle Git History (June 2025 – March 2026)

Based on the git log analysis, here are the significant milestones organized chronologically:

### **Early 2025 (March–April) — Infrastructure Stabilization**
- **Rootless Podman Achievement** (`5e07fb2b`): Full rootless podman support established with socat patterns
- **Podman VM Version Control** (`61e61a57`): Controlled podman machine version management implemented (stashing/restoration via crane)
- **Registry Operations Framework** (`fbdcf705`): Complete image listing, deletion, and collection utilities for VM container registries
- **Sentry/Bottle Namespace Unification** (ongoing through April): Multiple attempts to unify namespace models, stabilized with rootful/sudo podman approach

### **May–June 2025 — Regime Validation & Test Infrastructure**
- **Regime Validation Fixture Launch** (`fcdcba8a`): Added 21-case test fixture covering RBRR/RBRV/RBRN validators with negative and positive test coverage
- **Fast Qualify vs Release Qualify Split** (`1fd2fbe4`): Differentiated fast path (tabtargets/colophons/nameplate) from release path (+ shellcheck + full test suite)
- **Lenses Consolidation** (`1fd2fbe4`–`299bd1b1`): Migrated all lenses/ files into vov_veiled/ and memos/ directories for publication stripping

### **Late June–July 2025 — Vouch & Inspection Capabilities**
- **Vouch Artifact Multi-Platform** (`9be878fd`–`68c07222`): Buildx implementation for multi-platform vouch artifacts (amd64/arm64/armv7) with private pool support
- **Consecration Inspect Command** (`482bca78`–`013edd48`): Full rbf_inspect (compact and full modes) with SLSA boundaries, SBOM summary, package inventory, Dockerfile display
- **Local Vouch Preflight Gate** (`c0afb600`–`997ffcfb`): Unconditional docker image inspect on bottle start with copy-pasteable recovery command
- **-About Artifact Enrichment** (`9be878fd`–`04b9f660`): Added buildkit_metadata.json, cache_before.json, cache_after.json to capture build provenance

### **August 2025 — Consumer Documentation**
- **Consumer CLAUDE.md Template** (`bd069728`): Full glossary, role summary, 45-command reference table, credential safety, configuration regimes
- **Consumer README.md** (`bd069728`): Complete 15-step setup walkthrough across 4 phases, vessel directory structure, recovery scenarios
- **Test Execution Discipline** (added to dev CLAUDE.md): Sequential fixture execution rule (never parallel due to shared regime state)

### **September–October 2025 — BCG Compliance Audit**
- **Waves 1–2** (`bd6eba19`): Pseudo-ternary elimination, [[ ]]→test conversion, eval→indirect expansion, unguarded command guards, echo -e→printf
- **Wave 3** (`06c96ec8`): Command substitution elimination for vessel mode extraction, grep|head→while-read, find→temp file+read
- **Wave 4** (`58a96620`): RBF/RBGP command substitution to batch temp-file patterns; $(), date, jq, docker, git, curl to scratch-file patterns
- **Rule Refinement** (`280363c7`–`a38e12f6`): Replaced blanket command substitution prohibition with three specific patterns; renamed literal→tinder constants (ANSI-C quoted); removed zbuc_color() function
- **19-file coverage** with focused attention to highest-risk modules (BUC/RBK utilities)

### **November 2025 — Graft Mode & New Specifications**
- **Graft Vessel Mode Foundation** (`5aeff4b7`–`8f3d48bf`): 
  - Three ark arrival paths (conjure/bind/graft) with mandatory vouch
  - New consecration format: `[cbg]YYMMDDHHMMSS-rYYMMDDHHMMSS`
  - Two new specs: RBSAB (ark_about standalone pipeline), RBSAG (ark_graft)
  - Mode-aware vouch, inspector, director_vouch, trigger_build
- **Bind Vessel End-to-End** (`cd4d0d48`–`f9fd0ffd`):
  - rbf_mirror for upstream-to-GAR mirroring
  - Refactored vouch into bind/conjure branches
  - Containerized syft SBOM via docker run using RBRG_SYFT_IMAGE_REF
  - Digest fidelity verification (pin vs GAR Docker-Content-Digest)
  - Full pipeline: mirror → vouch → summon → inspect → bottle start
- **Sentry Prefix Rename** (`6e3f6a3e`–`9c308d31`): rbss → rbj (Recipe Bottle Jailer) to resolve terminal exclusivity violation in prefix tree
- **Unified Ark Creation** (`bfc1b530`–`f4ecc448`): DirectorConjuresArk → DirectorCreatesArk with rbf_create dispatcher routing by vessel mode

  - Lead with build provenance (GCB orchestration, SLSA, SBOM)
  - Follow with runtime isolation (sentry/bottle)
  - Added prominent maturity/security warning
  - Updated Vessel (now covers conjure/bind/graft) and Ark (user-controlled GAR) Key Concepts
- **Architecture Diagram** (added to consumer README): Visual representation of three-container runtime model
- **Legacy Directory Cleanup** (`c9ce7703`): Deleted legacy .github/workflows and RBM* directories

---

## Key Patterns & Themes

1. **Infrastructure-First Approach**: 2025 focused on stabilizing podman/container/namespace layer before build sophistication
2. **Specification-Driven Architecture**: Graft mode added via 12 spec updates + 2 new specs (RBSAB, RBSAG) in unified push
3. **Compliance-First Quality**: BCG audit affecting 19 files across 4 waves before major feature work
4. **Consumer-Centric Launch**: Heavy investment in consumer documentation (CLAUDE.md, README.md) in Aug–Nov 2025
5. **Iterative Review**: 4 rounds of specification feedback in Jan–Feb 2026 with naming corrections and runtime clarifications
6. **Command Consolidation**: Beseech (rbw-DB) removal in favor of unified DirectorChecksConsecrations; DirectorConjuresArk→DirectorCreatesArk mode dispatch

This history shows a mature engineering discipline: infrastructure stabilization → compliance audit → feature addition → documentation → consumer validation → refinement cycles.
